layman_headline: Extreme fear grips crypto — patience beats impulse right now.
layman_explanation: The crypto market is deep in 'Extreme Fear' territory at 25/100, and Bitcoin dominance at 56.8% means money is flowing out of smaller coins and into Bitcoin. All of the swing trade candidates today either have bearish chart structures, have already rallied too much in recent days, or carry serious data quality red flags. None of them offer the clean, low-risk entry we need for a confident swing trade.
layman_action: Stay in cash for now. The market fear is high but none of today's setups have a good enough risk-reward profile. Wait for a cleaner entry with confirmed reversal signals.
expert_reasoning: Systematically reviewing all 9 candidates: DEXE shows a -77% 24h drop with contradictory data (RSI 71 overbought yet price crashed, chart says $36 while price listed at $8.12) — data is unreliable, avoid. 币安人生 (BinanceLife) has the best chart bias (+0.80) with a bull flag pattern, but risk/reward is only 0.97x which is far below our 2.0x minimum, and the RSI at 58 after a -20% weekly drop is inconsistent. LDO has a strong chart bias (+0.85) with Three White Soldiers, but has already rallied 51.7% in 5 days — chasing extended momentum is not swing trading. ONDO is up 27% weekly with 0.38x risk/reward — terrible entry point. ETH has favorable RSI (39) but bearish chart structure (-0.70 bias) and only 1.41x risk/reward. MON and NIGHT both have bearish chart structures with no support levels or catalysts. BONK has zero technical data. VVV is slightly bearish with neutral RSI. High BTC dominance (56.8%) further suppresses alt upside. The disciplined move is to wait.
risk_factors: Extreme Fear can persist for weeks, meaning there may be further downside before a true reversal
High BTC dominance at 56.8% actively drains liquidity from altcoins — any alt position faces structural headwinds
Several candidates show contradictory data between listed prices, chart analysis prices, and indicators — executing on unreliable data is itself a major risk
watch_list: BTC price action around $66K-$68K — a breakout above $68K could signal broader market recovery and create alt entries
Fear & Greed Index — a sustained move above 30 would signal the worst of the selling pressure may be abating
LDO if it pulls back 10-15% toward $0.33 support with RSI dropping to 40-45 — that would create a proper entry with good risk/reward
market_context: The market is in Extreme Fear (25/100) with BTC dominance elevated at 56.8%, creating a hostile environment for altcoin swing trades. BTC itself is showing mild recovery (+2.7% weekly) but altcoins are broadly bleeding, with most candidates down 20-80% on the week.
context_banner: Extreme Fear across crypto markets with no clean swing setups — disciplined patience protects capital until risk/reward improves.

key_signals.description: Extreme Fear at 25/100 with flat trend indicates persistent selling pressure and no imminent sentiment reversal — contrarian buy signals exist but no technical confirmation yet.
The candidates with favorable RSI readings (ETH 39, MON 38, NIGHT 39) all have bearish chart structures (-0.70 bias), meaning oversold readings lack bullish confirmation for entries.
LDO's Three White Soldiers and 币安人生's Bull Flag are the strongest chart patterns but both suffer from poor risk/reward ratios (0.38x and 0.97x respectively) after sharp recent rallies.
Telegram's native Gram wallet announcement and White House crypto ethics provisions are medium-term bullish but lack immediate price catalysts for specific swing candidates.
Russia's $3,800 annual cap for retail crypto and Movement Labs bankruptcy filing reflect mixed regulatory and project health signals, adding to market uncertainty.
